title: Nos Vamos Pal Mundial
overview: Two taxi driver friends make a promise to the Virgin of Carmen: if Colombia qualifies for the 2014 World Cup, they’ll travel to Brazil to cheer for their team. When the miracle comes true, they must find a way to raise the money and make their dream a reality.
